---
title: "nmd_pipeline"
format: html
---

#Scripts
Data was downloaded directly from SRA using fastq-dump from the sra-tools package. This was downloaded into the originals folder. This also included files that were paired end read and single end read.
Fastq files from EBI were downloaded using wget

#QC
```{bash}
module load fastqc
module load py-multiqc/1.15-gcc-13.2.0-python-3.11.6

fastqc -o ../outputs/fastqc -t 4 ../originals/og/*.fastq.gz

multiqc ../../outputs/fastqc/og/ERR58805* -o ../../outputs/multiqc/og -n ERR58805
multiqc ../../outputs/fastqc/og/SRR32268* -o ../../outputs/multiqc/og -n SRR322685
multiqc ../../outputs/fastqc/og/SRR40812* -o ../../outputs/multiqc/og -n SRR40812
multiqc ../../outputs/fastqc/og/SRR84433* -o ../../outputs/multiqc/og -n SRR84433
```

#Trimming
Trimming was conducted to remove adapters and low quality reads
```{bash}
module load trimmomatic/0.39-gcc-13.2.0
module load parallel

parallel -j 4 -a PRJNA1220709_accessionids.txt java -jar /software/spackages_v0_21_prod/apps/linux-ubuntu22.04-zen2/gcc-13.2.0/trimmomatic-0.39-i5lbieeefpcxmue5vf4sfmh2p636cj27/bin/trimmomatic-0.39.jar PE -phred33 \
../../originals/{}_1.fastq.gz ../../originals/{}_2.fastq.gz \
../../outputs/trimmed/{}_1_paired.fastq.gz ../../outputs/trimmed/{}_1_unpaired.fastq.gz \
../../outputs/trimmed/{}_2_paired.fastq.gz ../../outputs/trimmed/{}_2_unpaired.fastq.gz \
ILLUMINACLIP:/software/spackages_v0_21_prod/apps/linux-ubuntu22.04-zen2/gcc-13.2.0/trimmomatic-0.39-i5lbieeefpcxmue5vf4sfmh2p636cj27/share/adapters/TruSeq3-PE.fa:2:30:10:2:True SLIDINGWINDOW:4:20 MINLEN:80

parallel -j 4 -a PRJNA340370_accessionids.txt java -jar /software/spackages_v0_21_prod/apps/linux-ubuntu22.04-zen2/gcc-13.2.0/trimmomatic-0.39-i5lbieeefpcxmue5vf4sfmh2p636cj27/bin/trimmomatic-0.39.jar SE -phred33 \
../../originals/{}_1.fastq.gz ../../outputs/trimmed/SE/{}_1_trimmed_fastq.gz \
ILLUMINACLIP:/software/spackages_v0_21_prod/apps/linux-ubuntu22.04-zen2/gcc-13.2.0/trimmomatic-0.39-i5lbieeefpcxmue5vf4sfmh2p636cj27/share/adapters/TruSeq3-SE.fa:2:30:10:2:True SLIDINGWINDOW:4:20 MINLEN:80

parallel -j 2 -a PRJNA1126174_accessionid.txt java -jar /software/spackages_v0_21_prod/apps/linux-ubuntu22.04-zen2/gcc-13.2.0/trimmomatic-0.39-i5lbieeefpcxmue5vf4sfmh2p636cj27/bin/trimmomatic-0.39.jar PE -phred33 \
../../originals/{}_1.fastq.gz ../../originals/{}_2.fastq.gz \
../../outputs/trimmed/{}_1_paired.fastq.gz ../../outputs/trimmed/{}_1_unpaired.fastq.gz \
../../outputs/trimmed/{}_2_paired.fastq.gz ../../outputs/trimmed/{}_2_unpaired.fastq.gz \
ILLUMINACLIP:/software/spackages_v0_21_prod/apps/linux-ubuntu22.04-zen2/gcc-13.2.0/trimmomatic-0.39-i5lbieeefpcxmue5vf4sfmh2p636cj27/share/adapters/TruSeq3-PE.fa:2:30:10:2:True SLIDINGWINDOW:4:20 MINLEN:80
```

#QC after trimming``
```{bash}
module load fastqc

fastqc -o ../outputs/fastqc/trimmed -t 2 ../outputs/trimmed/*_paired.fastq.gz
fastqc -o ../outputs/fastqc/trimmed -t 4 ../outputs/trimmed/SE/*fastq.gz

module load py-multiqc/1.15-gcc-13.2.0-python-3.11.6

multiqc ../outputs/fastqc/trimmed/SRR32268* -o ../outputs/multiqc/trimmed/ -n SRR32268
multiqc ../outputs/fastqc/trimmed/SE/SRR40812* -o ../outputs/multiqc/trimmed/ -n SRR40812
```

#Alignment
Single and paired end reads were aligned to the reference genome
##Hisat
Build index
```{bash}
module load hisat2
hisat2-build -p 38 ../../originals/ref/GRCh38.p14.genome.fa ../../outputs/align/hisat/hisat_index

hisat2_extract_exons.py ../../originals/ref/gencode.v48.basic.annotation.gtf > ../../outputs/align/hisat/genome_known_splice_sites.txt
```

For single ended reads
```{bash}
module load hisat2
module load samtools

hisat="../../outputs/align/hisat"
fastq="../../outputs/trimmed"
hisat_sam="../../outputs/align/hisat/hisat_sam"
hisat_bam="../../outputs/align/hisat/hisat_bam"

while read -r acc; do
    q_1="$fastq/SE/${acc}_1_trimmed_fastq.gz"
    bam="$hisat_bam/${acc}.bam"

    hisat2 -p 40 --dta --known-splicesite-infile "$hisat/genome_known_splice_sites.txt" \
        -x "$hisat/hisat_index" \
        -U "$q_1" \
        | samtools view -Su -@ 40 - \
        | samtools sort -@ 40 -o "$bam"
done < ../../metadata/PRJNA340370_accessionids.txt
```

For paired
```{bash}
hisat="../../outputs/align/hisat"
fastq="../../outputs/trimmed"
hisat_sam="../../outputs/align/hisat/hisat_sam"
hisat_bam="../../outputs/align/hisat/hisat_bam"

while read -r acc; do
        q_1="$fastq/${acc}_1_paired.fastq.gz"
        q_2="$fastq/${acc}_2_paired.fastq.gz"
        sam="$hisat_sam/${acc}.sam"

        hisat2 -p 40 --dta --known-splicesite-infile "$hisat/genome_known_splice_sites.txt" \
                -x "$hisat/hisat_index" \
                -1 "$q_1" -2 "$q_2" \
                -S "$sam" --no-discordant
done < ../../metadata/PRJNA1126174_accessionids.txt

while read -r acc; do
        q_1="$fastq/${acc}_1_paired.fastq.gz"
        q_2="$fastq/${acc}_2_paired.fastq.gz"
        sam="$hisat_sam/${acc}.sam"

        hisat2 -p 40 --dta --known-splicesite-infile "$hisat/genome_known_splice_sites.txt" \
                -x "$hisat/hisat_index" \
                -1 "$q_1" -2 "$q_2" \
                -S "$sam" --no-discordant
done < ../../metadata/PRJNA1220709_accessionids.txt


for filename in "$hisat_sam"/*.sam; do
    file=${filename##*/}
    file=${file%.sam}
    samtools view -@ 40 -Su "$filename" | samtools sort -@ 40 -o "$hisat_bam"/$file.bam
```

For untrimmed files
```{bash}
module load hisat2
module load samtools

hisat="../../../outputs/align/hisat"
fastq="../../../originals"
hisat_sam="../../../outputs/align/hisat/hisat_sam"
hisat_bam="../../../outputs/align/hisat/hisat_bam"

while read -r acc; do
    q_1="$fastq/${acc}_1.fastq.gz"
    bam="$hisat_bam/${acc}.bam"

    hisat2 -p 40 --dta --known-splicesite-infile "$hisat/genome_known_splice_sites.txt" \
        -x "$hisat/hisat_index" \
        -U "$q_1" \
        | samtools view -Su -@ 40 - \
        | samtools sort -@ 40 -o "$bam"
done < ../../../metadata/PRJNA515197_accessionids.txt
```

##Isoquant
```{bash}
minimap2 -d ../../outputs/align/isoquant/GRCh38.mmi ../../originals/ref/GRCh38.p14.genome.fa

isoquant.py \
    -d nanopore \
    --fastq ../../originals/ERR58805*.fastq.gz \
    -r GRCh38.mmi \
    --output ../../outputs/align/ \
    --threads 16
```

##Stringtie
for long read data
```{bash}
stringtie="/scratch/prj/dn_hamidlab_msc_proj/Libraries/stringtie-3.0.1.Linux_x86_64/stringtie"

bam="../../../outputs/align/isoquant/OUT/aux"
st_gtf="../../../outputs/align/stringtie"
gtf="../../../originals/ref"

for file in $bam/*.bam; do
    newfile=${file##*/}
    newfile=${newfile%.bam}
    $stringtie "$file" -p 35 -o "$st_gtf/$newfile.gtf" -G "$gtf/gencode.v49.chr_patch_hapl_scaff.annotation.gtf"
done
```

for short read data
```{bash}
stringtie="/scratch/prj/dn_hamidlab_msc_proj/Libraries/stringtie-3.0.1.Linux_x86_64/stringtie"

bam="../../../outputs/align/hisat/hisat_bam"
st_gtf="../../../outputs/align/stringtie"
gtf="../../../originals/ref"

for file in $bam/*.bam; do
    newfile=${file##*/}
    newfile=${newfile%.bam}
    $stringtie "$file" -p 35 -o "$st_gtf/$newfile.gtf" -G "$gtf/gencode.v49.chr_patch_hapl_scaff.annotation.gtf"
done
```

merge
```{bash}
stringtie="/scratch/prj/dn_hamidlab_msc_proj/Libraries/stringtie-3.0.1.Linux_x86_64/stringtie"

st_gtf="../../../outputs/align/stringtie"
gtf="../../../originals/ref"
stringtie_merged="../../../outputs/align/stringtie/stringtie_merged"

$stringtie --merge -G "$gtf/gencode.v49.chr_patch_hapl_scaff.annotation.gtf" $st_gtf/*.gtf \
-o $stringtie_merged/custom_transcriptome.gtf
```

gffread
```{bash}
gffread="/scratch/prj/dn_hamidlab_msc_proj/Libraries/gffread-0.12.7.Linux_x86_64/gffread"

gtf="../../../originals/ref"
stringtie_merged="../../../outputs/align/stringtie/stringtie_merged"

$gffread -w "$stringtie_merged/custom_transcripts.fa" -g "$gtf/GRCh38.p14.genome.fa" "$stringtie_merged/custom_transcriptome.gtf"
```

##Kallisto for quantification
```{bash}
module load hisat2
module load samtools

fastq="../../outputs/trimmed"
kallisto="/scratch/prj/dn_hamidlab_msc_proj/Libraries/kallisto/kallisto"
kallisto_dir="../../outputs/align/kallisto/"

while read -r acc; do
	q_1="$fastq/${acc}_1_paired.fastq.gz"
	q_2="$fastq/${acc}_2_paired.fastq.gz"

	$kallisto quant -i $kallisto_dir/../kallisto_index.idx \
		-t 4 -o $kallisto_dir/${acc} \
		"$q_1" "$q_2"
done < ../../metadata/PRJNA1220709_accessionids.txt

while read -r acc; do
	q_1="$fastq/${acc}_1_paired.fastq.gz"
	q_2="$fastq/${acc}_2_paired.fastq.gz"

	$kallisto quant -i $kallisto_dir/../kallisto_index.idx \
		-t 4 -o $kallisto_dir/${acc} \
		"$q_1" "$q_2"
done < ../../metadata/PRJNA1126174_accessionid.txt

while read -r acc; do
    q_1="$fastq/SE/${acc}_1_trimmed_fastq.gz"
        $kallisto quant -i $kallisto_dir/../kallisto_index.idx \
                -o $kallisto_dir/${acc} \
                --single -t 4\
                -l 200 \
                -s 50 \
                "$q_1"
done < ../../metadata/PRJNA340370_accessionids.txt

while read -r acc; do
    q_1="../../originals/${acc}.fastq.gz"
        $kallisto quant -i $kallisto_dir/../kallisto_index.idx \
                -o $kallisto_dir/${acc} \
                --single -t 4\
                -l 200 \
                -s 50 \
                "$q_1"
done < ../../metadata/PRJEB44747_accessionids.txt

while read -r acc; do
    q_1="../../originals/${acc}_1.fastq.gz"
        $kallisto quant -i $kallisto_dir/../kallisto_index.idx \
                -o $kallisto_dir/${acc} \
                --single -t 4\
                -l 200 \
                -s 50 \
                "$q_1"
done < ../../metadata/PRJNA515197_accessionids.txt
```
